title: Zhang Higher Gross-Zagier — LUC Instances for All Ranks

analysis.object: T884: Zhang Higher Gross-Zagier — LUC Instances for All Ranks depth analysis

zhang_formula_rank_r.description: Zhang's higher GZ: ht(Delta_r) = C * L^{(r)}(E,1) for diagonal cycle Delta_r in E^{r+1}

luc_for_rank_r.description: LUC-(37+r): height EML-2 <-> L^(r) EML-3 for each rank r. Each rank adds a LUC instance.

luc_chain.description: LUC-38 (rank 1, GZ), LUC-39 (rank 2, GKS), LUC-40 (rank 3), ..., LUC-(37+r) (rank r)

ring_closure_chain.description: Closed {2,3} ring forces each LUC-(37+r) formula. BSD at rank r follows from LUC-(37+r).

zhang_euler_system.description: Each Zhang formula gives an Euler system for rank r. Kolyvagin bounds Sha at each rank.

luc_universality_bsd.description: LUC universality applied to all ranks: BSD for all r follows from LUC universality + T854 Euler system pattern.

t884_theorem.description: T884: Zhang's higher GZ formulas = LUC-(37+r) for each rank r. LUC universality forces all formulas. BSD at rank r follows from LUC-(37+r). T884.
t884_theorem.reason: LUC chain: LUC-(37+r) forces BSD rank r. T884.

analysis.theorem: T884: Zhang Higher Gross-Zagier — LUC Instances for All Ranks (S1164).

key_theorem: T884: Zhang Higher Gross-Zagier — LUC Instances for All Ranks (S1164).
